title: Novena to St. Padre Pio
subtitle: 9 Days of Prayer with the Padre of San Giovanni Rotondo
description: Ask St. Padre Pio to intercede for your intentions before the throne of God.
closing: St. Pio of Pietrelcina, pray for us.

days.prayer: Dear St. Padre Pio, I come before you on this first day, asking your intercession for the gift of living faith. You believed with your whole heart, body, and soul — your very hands bore the wounds of the One you loved. Pray that my faith may not waver when darkness comes, and that I may cling to Christ as you did, even in the long nights of suffering. Amen.
days.meditation: Faith is the foundation of everything. Where it wavers, everything wavers. Ask Padre Pio to pray for the grace to believe even when you cannot feel.

scripture.text: Now faith is the substance of things to be hoped for, the evidence of things that appear not.

days.prayer: Dear St. Padre Pio, on this second day I ask you to pray for the gift of hope. You endured decades of suffering, misunderstanding, and restrictions — yet you never despaired. You said, "Pray, hope, and don't worry." Obtain for me that unshakeable hope which rests not in circumstances but in God's mercy and faithfulness. When I see no way forward, let me see the risen Christ. Amen.
days.meditation: Hope is not optimism. It is the theological virtue that anchors the soul in God's promise even when all human hope is lost.

scripture.text: For we are saved by hope. But hope that is seen is not hope. For what a man seeth, why doth he hope for? But if we hope for that which we see not, we wait for it with patience.

days.prayer: Dear St. Padre Pio, today I ask you to pray that love may grow in me — love of God above all things, and love of neighbor as myself. You were known for your burning love for souls. You spent hours in the confessional because every sinner was, to you, a soul redeemed by the Blood of Christ. Pray that I may see others as God sees them, and love as He loves. Amen.
days.meditation: Padre Pio said that the most beautiful act of faith is to love one's neighbor. Ask for the grace to love the difficult people God has placed in your life.

scripture.text: And now there remain faith, hope, and charity, these three: but the greatest of these is charity.

days.prayer: Dear St. Padre Pio, on this fourth day I ask you to intercede for purity of heart — that my intentions, desires, and thoughts may be ordered toward God. You warned souls against the deceptions of the enemy, who enters through vanity and distraction. Pray that I may guard my heart and keep it as a dwelling place for the Holy Spirit. Purify what is impure in me, and let me seek God alone. Amen.
days.meditation: The pure in heart shall see God. Ask Padre Pio to help you identify what most obscures God in your life.

scripture.text: Blessed are the clean of heart: for they shall see God.

days.intention: For the Grace to Bear Suffering
days.prayer: Dear St. Padre Pio, you bore the sacred wounds of Christ for fifty years, suffering for the sins of others, for the souls in Purgatory, and for those who did not know God. Today I bring to you my own suffering — [name your cross silently]. Teach me to unite it to the Cross of Christ, so that nothing is wasted, and that even my pain may become a prayer. Amen.
days.meditation: Padre Pio said: "The Cross is the school of love." Ask for the grace not merely to endure suffering, but to offer it.

scripture.text: Who now rejoice in my sufferings for you, and fill up those things that are wanting of the sufferings of Christ, in my flesh, for his body, which is the church.

days.prayer: Dear St. Padre Pio, you had a special love for the souls in Purgatory, and they often appeared to you asking for prayers. On this sixth day I ask you to intercede for all the holy souls — especially those who have no one to pray for them, and for all those I have known and loved who have gone before me. May God's mercy hasten their purification and bring them to the eternal joy of His presence. Amen.
days.meditation: The Church Suffering needs our prayers. Offer a Rosary or De Profundis today for the souls in Purgatory.

scripture.text: It is therefore a holy and wholesome thought to pray for the dead, that they may be loosed from sins.

days.prayer: Dear St. Padre Pio, your whole life was an act of intercession for sinners. You once said that you would stand at the gates of Heaven and not enter unless you brought all the souls who had come to you. Today I entrust to you the souls of those I love who have wandered from God — [name them silently]. Ask Our Lord to seek them out as the lost sheep, to call them home by name, and to grant them the grace of a true conversion. Amen.
days.meditation: Never give up praying for those who are far from God. Padre Pio believed no soul was too hardened for God's mercy.

scripture.text: I say to you, that even so there shall be joy in heaven upon one sinner that doth penance, more than upon ninety-nine just who need not penance.

days.prayer: Dear St. Padre Pio, you loved the Church with all your heart, even when she was a source of suffering to you. You obeyed even the most painful restrictions because you saw in the Church the Body of Christ. Today I pray with you for the Holy Father, for bishops and priests, for all the faithful — that the Church may be holy, humble, and radiantly merciful, a true sign of Christ to a wounded world. Amen.
days.meditation: Padre Pio never spoke a word against Church authority, even when wrongly suspected. Ask for the grace to love the Church as she is, while praying for her sanctity.

scripture.text: Christ also loved the church, and delivered himself up for it: That he might sanctify it, cleansing it by the laver of water in the word of life: That he might present it to himself a glorious church, not having spot or wrinkle.

days.intention: For the Grace of Final Perseverance
days.prayer: Dear St. Padre Pio, on this last day I ask for the greatest grace of all — the grace of final perseverance. That I may remain faithful to God to the very end, and that when my last hour comes, I may have a holy death in the peace of Christ, with Mary at my side as she was at Calvary. You said: "The greatest gift God can give a soul is not to make it ecstatic — it is to be there when it dies." Be there for me, Padre. And pray that I may one day meet you in the Father's House. Amen.
days.meditation: Every day is a step toward eternity. Ask Padre Pio to intercede for a holy death — for you and for all those you love.

scripture.text: Be thou faithful until death: and I will give thee the crown of life.

title: Efficacious Novena to the Sacred Heart
subtitle: Padre Pio's Signature Prayer — Prayed Daily for Every Soul Who Asked
description: St. Padre Pio prayed this novena every day for every person who asked him for prayers. He promised it would never be known to fail.
closing: Sacred Heart of Jesus, I place all my trust in Thee.

days.prayer:
O my Jesus, You have said: 'Truly I say to you, ask and you will receive, seek and you will find, knock and it will be opened to you.' Behold I knock, I seek and ask for the grace of [state your intention silently]. Our Father... Hail Mary... Glory Be...

Sacred Heart of Jesus, I place all my trust in Thee.
days.meditation: On this first day, bring your intention before the Sacred Heart with complete trust. God hears every prayer made with faith.

scripture.text: Ask, and it shall be given you: seek, and you shall find: knock, and it shall be opened to you.

days.prayer:
O my Jesus, You have said: 'Truly I say to you, if you ask anything of the Father in My name, He will give it to you.' Behold, in Your name I ask the Father for the grace of [state your intention silently]. Our Father... Hail Mary... Glory Be...

Sacred Heart of Jesus, I place all my trust in Thee.
days.meditation: Pray today in the Name of Jesus — not in your own strength, but in His. This is the surest path to the Father's heart.

scripture.text: Amen, amen I say to you: if you ask the Father any thing in my name, he will give it you.

days.prayer:
O my Jesus, You have said: 'Truly I say to you, heaven and earth will pass away but my words will not pass away.' Encouraged by Your infallible words I now ask for the grace of [state your intention silently]. Our Father... Hail Mary... Glory Be...

Sacred Heart of Jesus, I place all my trust in Thee.
days.meditation: God's word does not return void. Place your confidence not in your own worthiness but in the faithfulness of the One who promised.

scripture.text: So shall my word be, which shall go forth from my mouth: it shall not return to me void, but it shall do whatsoever I please, and shall prosper in the things for which I sent it.

days.prayer:
O Sacred Heart of Jesus, for whom it is impossible not to have compassion on the afflicted, have pity on us miserable sinners and grant us the grace which we ask of Thee, through the Sorrowful and Immaculate Heart of Mary, Your tender Mother and ours. Our Father... Hail Mary... Glory Be...

Sacred Heart of Jesus, I place all my trust in Thee.
days.meditation: Today, surrender your intention entirely to God. Ask not only that it be granted, but that His will be done even if it takes a form you do not expect.

scripture.text: Father, if thou wilt, remove this chalice from me: but yet not my will, but thine be done.

days.prayer:
Hail, Holy Queen, Mother of Mercy, our life, our sweetness and our hope. To thee do we cry, poor banished children of Eve. To thee do we send up our sighs, mourning and weeping in this valley of tears. Turn then, most gracious Advocate, thine eyes of mercy toward us. And after this our exile, show unto us the blessed fruit of thy womb, Jesus. O clement, O loving, O sweet Virgin Mary.

Sacred Heart of Jesus, I place all my trust in Thee.
days.meditation: Padre Pio had a deep devotion to Our Lady of Grace. Ask Mary today to carry your intention to her Son.

scripture.text: His mother saith to the waiters: Whatsoever he shall say to you, do ye.

days.prayer:
O Sacred Heart of Jesus, in You I place all my hope and confidence. You know all my needs — You see my weakness — and You know how much I need Your grace and mercy. I ask with a humble and contrite heart for [state your intention silently], trusting that in Your time and in Your way, You will answer. Our Father... Hail Mary... Glory Be...

Sacred Heart of Jesus, I place all my trust in Thee.
days.meditation: God's timing is not our timing. Ask today for the patience to wait in faith without anxiety.

scripture.text: For the vision is yet for an appointed time, and it shall appear at the end, and shall not lie: if it make any delay, wait for it, for it shall surely come, and it shall not be slack.

days.prayer:
O Heart of Jesus, burning with love for us, inflame our hearts with love for You. Forgive me, Lord, for the times I have come to You only in need and forgotten to give thanks for so much. Today I thank You for the hidden graces already granted — the prayers answered, the falls prevented, the mercies I did not deserve. Sacred Heart of Jesus, I thank You. Our Father... Hail Mary... Glory Be...

Sacred Heart of Jesus, I place all my trust in Thee.
days.meditation: Give thanks today — not for what you hope to receive, but for what you have already been given without deserving it.

scripture.text: Be nothing solicitous; but in every thing, by prayer and supplication, with thanksgiving, let your petitions be made known to God.

days.prayer:
O Eternal Father, I offer Thee the Most Precious Blood of Thy Divine Son, Jesus, in union with the Masses said throughout the world today, for all the holy souls in Purgatory, for sinners everywhere, for sinners in the universal church, those in my own home and within my family. Amen.

Sacred Heart of Jesus, I place all my trust in Thee.
days.meditation: Today, unite your intention to the sacrifice of the Mass. Every Mass is Calvary made present. Your prayer joined to it becomes infinitely powerful.

scripture.text: How much more shall the blood of Christ, who by the Holy Ghost offered himself unspotted unto God, cleanse our conscience from dead works, to serve the living God?

days.prayer:
O Sacred Heart of Jesus, I give and consecrate to Thee my person and my life, my actions, trials and sufferings, so that I may be unwilling to make use of any part of my being other than to honor, love and glorify Thee. This is my unchanging intention — to be all Thine and to do all things for Thy love. I renounce with my whole heart whatever is displeasing to Thee.

May Your Heart be the first in all my intentions, the resting place of all my affections, and the beginning and end of all my desires. Amen.

Sacred Heart of Jesus, I place all my trust in Thee.
days.meditation: On this final day, give yourself entirely to the Sacred Heart. This is the culmination — not just receiving graces but giving yourself back to the One who gave Himself for you.

scripture.text: And I live, now not I; but Christ liveth in me. And that I live now in the flesh, I live in the faith of the Son of God, who loved me, and delivered himself for me.
